selection.caveat: window boundaries derive from LLM-generated timestamps; frames are canonical
transcript_excerpt: [0s-7s] The person is sewing a piece of grey fabric, guiding it through the sewing machine with both hands. They finish the seam, pull the fabric slightly away from the needle, and use a pair of scissors in their right hand to cut the thread.

[7s-14s] The person takes the finished fabric piece with their left hand and places it on a pile to their left. They then reach over to the pile, pick up a new piece of grey fabric, and bring it to the sewing machine workspace.

[14s-23s] Using the scissors, the person snips a small loose thread from the new fabric piece. They set the scissors down, pick up the end of a continuous blue trim, and carefully align it with the top edge of the grey fabric piece under the sewing machine foot.
window_activities: Cut continuous thread chain with scissors
Grab unsewn fabric from disorganized pile
